Defendant'S Motion To Deem Request For Admissions Admitted And Compel Responses To Special Interrogatories, Form Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents Hearing
Off Calendar Apr-11-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: Defendant's Motion To Deem Request For Admissions Admitted And Compel Responses To Special Interrogatories, Form Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents Hearing.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Matter is off calendar. Dismissal filed on March 25, 2022. In addition, this is a real property action and this motion was erroneously set in department 302 rather than 501.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)
